data.revised_prompt: photorealistic cinematic Japanese drama film still, 16:9. A single East Asian woman in her early 30s, shoulder length black hair, cream cardigan, opens a small letter-writing stationery shop in Kamakura at dawn. Medium shot from behind her shoulder, one hand on the key, paper envelopes visible inside the doorway, red camellia pot beside the door. Emotional, quiet, professional movie lighting. Only one person in frame, no readable text.
